meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: discode.ai
products.tagline: 100+ AI models, one interface. ECO friendly.
products.summaryZh: 100+ AI模型，统一接口。环保友好。
products.descriptionZh: Discode 是符合欧盟标准的AI路由器：一个界面接入100多种模型，每条提示词自动路由至最合适的模型。您也可按智能、速度、环保三个维度自行调优。它会显示哪个模型作答及原因，在数据离开设备前就地隐去个人信息，对复杂问题跨模型交叉验证，并估算每次请求的二氧化碳、水资源和能源足迹。由维也纳🇦🇹打造。你的AI，你的节奏。
products.description: discode is your EU-friendly AI router: one interface for 100+ models, with every prompt auto-routed to the best one for the job. Or fine-tune it yourself along Smarter, Speed and Eco. It shows you which model answered and why, redacts your personal data on-device before anything leaves, checks the hard answers across multiple models, and estimates the CO₂, water and energy footprint of every request. Built in Vienna 🇦🇹. Your AI, your rhythm.

products.name: GetCompress
products.tagline: Lossless media compression without context switching
products.summaryZh: 无损媒体压缩，无需切换上下文
products.descriptionZh: GetCompress 是一款轻量级桌面应用，可快速批量压缩视频、图片、GIF 和 PDF 文件：在几乎不损失画质的前提下，文件体积最高可缩减 90%。离线压缩功能帮你节省时间并保障文件安全。拖拽文件即可操作，无需额外点击。支持 Mac、Windows 和 Linux 系统。
products.description: GetCompress is a lightweight desktop app that quickly compresses videos, images, GIFs, PDFs in batches: get up to 90% smaller files with minimal quality loss. Save your time & keep files safe with offline compression. Drag files in and out, no extra clicks. Available for Mac, Windows and Linux.

products.name: Persona.js
products.tagline: Add WebMCP-native AI chat to any Frontend
products.summaryZh: 为任意前端添加原生WebMCP AI聊天功能
products.descriptionZh: Persona 是一个轻量级、开源的 AI 聊天 UI 库，可嵌入任何网站，从现代应用到静态 HTML 均可使用。与基于 React 的聊天框架不同，Persona 无需框架、不依赖后端，并原生支持 WebMCP，因此您的助手能够发现并执行父页面暴露的工具。无需重建前端或编写定制 API，即可添加流式聊天、语音、主题和交互式副驾驶体验。
products.description: Persona is a lightweight, open-source AI chat UI library that embeds into any website, from modern apps to static HTML. Unlike React-based chat frameworks, Persona is framework-free, backend-agnostic, and WebMCP-native, so your assistant can discover and execute tools exposed by the parent page. Add streaming chat, voice, theming, and interactive copilot experiences without rebuilding your frontend or writing bespoke APIs.

products.name: Dotient
products.tagline: Your local semantic search app
products.summaryZh: 你的本地语义搜索应用
products.descriptionZh: Dotient 是一款本地优先的桌面应用，通过机器学习驱动的视觉搜索功能，帮助您整理和检索个人文件。您的文件保持私密，且支持离线使用。
products.description: Dotient is a local-first desktop application that helps you organize and search through your personal files using ML-powered visual search. Your files stay private, work offline.

products.name: Lyto
products.tagline: "One AI agent across your browser, tools, and messages "
products.summaryZh: 一个AI代理，横跨你的浏览器、工具和消息。
products.descriptionZh: Lyto AI 是一款Chrome扩展程序，让您完全掌控浏览器操作。支持打开和关闭标签页、滚动、点击、填写表单以及与所有DOM元素交互。可与Google Docs、Gmail和Google Sheets集成。在Chrome内即可完成研究、任务自动化及工作流程管理。
products.description: Lyto AI is a Chrome extension that gives you full control over your browser. Open and close tabs, scroll, click, fill forms, and interact with every DOM element. Integrates with Google Docs, Gmail, and Google Sheets. Research, automate tasks, and organize your workflow — all inside Chrome.

products.name: Wirable
products.tagline: Can AI agents use your product?
products.summaryZh: AI代理能否使用你的产品？
products.descriptionZh: Wirable 测试AI代理能否实际使用你的产品。粘贴一个URL，运行真实的代理工作流，即可获得百分制评分，每次通过或失败都有明确证据支撑。若代理遇到障碍，Wirable会在你的产品前部署MCP代理，使其无需你编写代码即可完成任务。
products.description: Wirable tests whether AI agents can actually use your product. Paste a URL, run real agent workflows, and get a score out of 100 with clear evidence behind every pass or fail. If agents get stuck, Wirable hosts an MCP proxy in front of your product so they can complete the job without you shipping code.

products.name: Schema Source by Tabstack
products.tagline: Turn any URL into a JSON Schema, Zod, or Pydantic model
products.summaryZh: 将任意URL转换为JSON Schema、Zod或Pydantic模型
products.descriptionZh: 获取任意URL的JSON Schema。粘贴链接即可获得可直接使用的JSON Schema、Zod对象或Pydantic模型，直接复制到提取或验证代码中。Schema Source会学习每个网站的URL模式，因此结果返回迅速，且在同一结构的页面间保持一致。每个结果同时也是API：通过JSON内容协商请求同一URL，即可获取缓存的Schema，无需密钥。免费提供，由Tabstack团队开发——Mozilla支持。
products.description: Get the JSON Schema for any URL. Paste a link and get a ready-to-use schema as JSON Schema, a Zod object, or a Pydantic model. Copy it straight into your extraction or validation code. Schema Source learns each site's URL patterns, so results come back fast and stay consistent across pages of the same shape. Every result is also an API: request the same URL with JSON content negotiation and get the cached schema back, no key required. Free, by the team behind Tabstack—backed by Mozilla.

products.name: kodwai
products.tagline: The first platform that scores how you Vibe Code
products.summaryZh: 首个为你的Vibe Code打分的平台
products.descriptionZh: Kodwai 是首个评估你与 AI 编程代理（Claude Code、Cursor、Codex）协作能力的平台。在自有终端中解决真实挑战；CLI 会捕获你的代码、测试、Git 历史、代理对话记录及时间，然后从三个维度——方向、成果与提升——进行评分，每个维度均附有相应依据。登上公开排行榜、赢取徽章，并构建展示你工程能力而非记忆能力的个人档案。免费使用，自带代理。
products.description: Kodwai is the first platform that scores how well you collaborate with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex). Solve real challenges in your own terminal; the CLI captures your code, tests, git history, agent transcript, and time, then scores you across three axes: Direction, Outcome, and Lift, each citing its own evidence. Climb a public leaderboard, earn badges, and build a profile that shows how you engineer, not what you memorized. Free, bring your own agent.

products.name: Weavz.io
products.tagline: Let AI agents safely act in 1,000+ customer apps
products.summaryZh: 让AI代理在1000多个客户应用中安全行动
products.descriptionZh: 让您的AI代理在客户已使用的应用中安全行动，如Slack、Gmail、CRM和计费系统。在Claude、ChatGPT或Cursor中为代理配置Weavz MCP，或在您自己的运行时中配置CLI工作区。通过Code Mode的三次调用，它可接入1000多个集成和12000多个代理工具，并具备人工审批、范围限定凭证、状态、文件和审计功能。自行嵌入？通过API及TypeScript/Python SDK配置工作区、连接用户并生成范围限定令牌。
products.description: Let your AI agents safely act in the apps your customers already use, like Slack, Gmail, CRMs, and billing. Give an agent a Weavz MCP in Claude, ChatGPT, or Cursor, or a CLI workspace in your own runtime. It reaches 1,000+ integrations and 12,000+ agent tools through Code Mode's 3 calls, with Human Gates, scoped credentials, state, files, and audit. Embedding it yourself? Provision workspaces, connect users, and mint scoped tokens via the API and TypeScript/Python SDKs.

products.name: FocusStack
products.tagline: Easiest way to understand, improve and protect your focus
products.summaryZh: 最轻松的方式，理解、提升并保护你的专注力
products.descriptionZh: FocusStack 专为动手创造的人设计。开启专注时段，以任务命名，选择项目。FocusStack 自动追踪每个应用和网站，屏蔽干扰项，并在你分心时提醒你回归。一键即可启动完整工作环境。一天结束时，你能清晰看到专注力的去向，以及每个项目的实际成本。无需云端，无需订阅。它在你的设备上运行。一次付费，终身使用。
products.description: FocusStack is for people who make things. Start a focus session, name it after your task, pick the project. FocusStack tracks every app and site automatically, blocks what derails you, and nudges you back when you drift. One click launches your whole work setup at once. At the end of the day, you see exactly where your focus went and what each project actually cost you. No cloud. No subscription. It runs on your machine. Pay once, keep it for life.

products.name: Salestrics Resolve Beta
products.tagline: The AI-Native Service Desk for Startups
products.summaryZh: 面向初创企业的AI原生服务台
products.descriptionZh: Salestrics Resolve 将 Salestrics 从 CRM 扩展至面向客户支持、IT 及开发团队的 AI 原生平台。通过 Sprint 管理案例、知识库、资产、授权、服务请求、变更请求、已知错误、服务合同及项目，所有内容均通过共享账户、联系人、活动和文件相互关联。Resolve 现已在 Scale 和 Enterprise 计划中提供 Beta 版本，将于 7 月 27 日正式上线。
products.description: Salestrics Resolve expands Salestrics beyond CRM with an AI-native platform for customer support, IT, and development teams. Manage cases, knowledge, assets, entitlements, service requests, change requests, known errors, service contracts, and projects with Sprint—all connected through shared accounts, contacts, activities, and files. Resolve is available in Beta on Scale and Enterprise plans, with full launch on July 27.

products.name: DevGlobe
products.tagline: Where developers build in public, live on a globe
products.summaryZh: 开发者公开构建，实时呈现于地球之上
products.descriptionZh: 将你的IDE连接起来，在编码时以3D地球形式实时呈现。按仓库、文件和语言追踪你的统计数据，将项目发布至开发者社区，并获取关注。
products.description: Connect your IDE and appear live on a 3D globe as you code. Track your stats per repo, file, and language, launch your projects to a community of builders, and get noticed.

products.name: AI-native - Continuous Planning Platform
products.tagline: Product Market Fitment, to PRDs, work breakdown & assignment
products.summaryZh: 产品市场契合度，到PRD，再到工作分解与分配。
products.descriptionZh: 在哈佛商学院项目期间，我们着手弥合一个重大的组织生产力鸿沟——意识到即便AI以光速构建，团队仍以人类速度同步，困于孤岛式规划、分散的信息源和无休止的会议。为此，我们打造了nexusync.io。从混乱的手动工作流转向AI原生的“智能系统”，通过将所有上下文整合至中央数据湖，我们以零新增人员实现了从愿景到行动的闪电式推进。
products.description: During my HBS program, We set out to bridge a major organizational productivity gap, realizing that even with AI building at light speed, teams still sync at human speed trapped in siloed planning, scattered sources of truth, and endless meetings. That's why we built nexusync.io. We shifted from messy, manual workflows to an AI-native "System of Intelligence". By consolidating all context into a central lake, we went from vision to action with 0 hires moving lightning fast.

products.name: Auto-Immo PRO 2.0
products.tagline: Turn property scans into plans, 3D, reports & estimates
products.summaryZh: 将房产扫描转化为平面图、3D模型、报告与估算
products.descriptionZh: Auto-Immo PRO V2 超越平面图范畴，将LiDAR房产扫描、可编辑测量、蓝牙激光验证与FLIR热成像文档整合于一套专业工作流中。用户可将扫描结果转化为平面图、墙面立面图、3D模型、报告及翻新估算，并导出全部内容用于房地产、翻新、检测与施工场景。
products.description: Auto-Immo PRO V2 goes beyond floor plans. It combines LiDAR property scanning, editable measurements, Bluetooth laser verification and FLIR thermal documentation in one professional workflow. Users can turn a scan into floor plans, wall elevations, 3D models, reports and renovation estimates, then export everything for real estate, renovation, inspection and construction use.

products.name: ByteAsk Embedded MCP - Open Source
products.tagline: Stop your coding agent from guessing at datasheets
products.summaryZh: 阻止你的编码代理猜测数据手册
products.descriptionZh: 你的编码助手在猜测数据手册——自信满满，却错误百出。ByteAsk Embedded MCP 为 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 及任何 MCP 客户端提供精确且标注页码的事实：寄存器映射、协议功能码、SCPI 命令、标准阈值、数据手册规格。内容严格源自原始资料，或诚实标注“无可靠匹配”——绝不猜测寄存器值。该工具基于一项旨在衡量并缩小 C/C++ 编码助手差距的研究成果构建。开源。
products.description: Your coding agent guesses at the datasheet - confidently, and wrong. ByteAsk Embedded MCP hands Claude Code, Codex, Cursor and any MCP client the exact, page-cited fact instead: register maps, protocol function codes, SCPI commands, standard thresholds, datasheet specs. Verbatim from the source, or an honest "no confident match" - never a guessed register value. Built from a research effort to measure and close the gap on C/C++ coding agents. Open source.

products.name: VersaVoice AI
products.tagline: Your Voice. Without Borders. (ditch robotic translators)
products.summaryZh: 你的声音，无界。（告别机械翻译）
products.descriptionZh: 2025年12月，我们开始打造连接世界的即时通讯应用！VersaVoice AI——用你的声音取代机械翻译器：30秒克隆声音，支持93种语言翻译，保留你的语气与个性。提供优质音频与增强聊天功能，营造低噪、现代的通讯体验。沟通无碍。四种模式+面对面翻译。一个套餐覆盖全家。无广告。不出售数据。私密、现代，为未来而生。
products.description: In December 2025 we ventured into building the messaging app that connects the world! VersaVoice AI - it replaces robotic translators with YOUR voice - cloned in 30s, translated into 93 languages, preserving your tone and personality. It offers superior audio and enhanced chat features for a low noise and modern messaging experience. Flawless communication. Four modes + in-person translation. One plan powers your whole family. No ads. No data selling. Private, modern, built for what's next.

products.name: Free YouTube Thumbnail Maker
products.tagline: Make a custom YouTube thumbnail for free.
products.summaryZh: 免费制作自定义YouTube缩略图。
products.descriptionZh: 免费制作自定义YouTube缩略图。选择可编辑模板，替换图片，编辑文字，调整颜色，下载16:9的JPG格式，并用你的标题预览。
products.description: Create a custom YouTube thumbnail for free. Choose editable templates, replace images, edit text, adjust colors, download a 16:9 JPG, and preview it with your title.

products.name: AnimateCaptions
products.tagline: Add Animated Captions To Videos for TikTok, Reels & Shorts
products.summaryZh: 为TikTok、Reels和Shorts视频添加动画字幕
products.descriptionZh: 上传视频片段，从32+种逐字动画字幕样式中选择（包括Mr Beast、Hormozi等风格），导出全分辨率内嵌字幕的MP4文件。无需剪辑软件，无AI积分加价。免费起步，套餐每月7.99美元起——比Submagic或Captions.ai更实惠。
products.description: Upload a clip, pick from 32+ animated word-by-word caption styles (Mr Beast, Hormozi, and more), and export a full-res burned-in MP4. No editing software, no AI-credit upcharges. Free to start, plans from $7.99/mo — cheaper than Submagic or Captions.ai.

products.name: PDFTools
products.tagline: Free, private PDF editor — no server uploads, no signup
products.summaryZh: 免费、私密的PDF编辑器——无需上传至服务器，无需注册
products.descriptionZh: 40余款免费在线PDF工具，包含高级功能：压缩、合并、拆分、转换图片、提取文本、对比PDF、生成证书、PDF转音频、创建小册子等。100%免费，无需上传，所有处理均在浏览器内完成。
products.description: 40+ free online PDF tools including premium features: compress, merge, split, convert images, extract text, compare PDFs, generate certificates, convert PDF to audio, create booklets, and more. 100% free, no uploads, all processing happens in your browser.

products.name: TeenCycle
products.tagline: Private, offline period tracker. Pay once, no account.
products.summaryZh: 私密、离线经期追踪器。一次付费，无需账户。
products.descriptionZh: TeenCycle 是一款完全在手机上运行的经期追踪应用。无需账户、无云端、无分析、无广告——任何数据都不会离开设备，因此没有任何信息可供他人出售、泄露或交出。三个界面，一次点击即可记录，日历会预估你下一次经期的大致时间。一位母亲和她的青春期女儿为青少年打造了这款应用，但它同样适用于任何不希望被追踪的人。免费使用7天，之后一次性支付9.99美元。绝无订阅。支持iOS和Android系统。
products.description: TeenCycle is a period tracker that runs entirely on your phone. No account, no cloud, no analytics, no ads — nothing ever leaves the device, so there is nothing for anyone to sell, leak, or hand over. Three screens, one tap to log, and a calendar that estimates when your next period is likely. A mom and her teenage daughter built it for teens, but it works for anyone who would rather not be tracked. Free for 7 days, then $9.99 once. Never a subscription. On iOS and Android.
